title: gentiana scabrida subsp. scabrida
intro: Gentiana scabrida subsp. scabrida is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves, and a trumpet-shaped purple flower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gentiana scabrida subsp. scabrida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal issues, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions.
